sourceSelectionRule: Operational U1 finite two-pass query-result union defined exactly by oa-source-census-index-observation-2026-v8 at sha256:ca96f62934461a5effed077ee4d0813039d23ddb89eafe649791714beacbc615; query-only tail probes bound each pass, terminal query membership is retained separately from mutable returned star metadata, and all-and-only in-domain dispositions form the source population
compositionSelectionRule: U2 corpus: preregistered meaningful version-pinned component compositions spanning every named facet family, multi-provider cells, forcing features, and one frozen holdout family; arbitrary combinations excluded only by the frozen rule
executionSamplingRule: Within every frozen source-system by backend-family stratum, rank independently adjudicated compatible cells by sha256(seed || cell-id), select the lowest rank in every nonempty stratum, then continue global hash rank without replacement until at least 30% of all compatible cells are selected

metrics.numerator: number of preregistered compilation cells with exactly one terminal result
sum of preregistered source-fact weights for preserved, derived, or lowered canonical dispositions
within-system sum of source-fact weights for preserved, derived, or lowered canonical dispositions
metrics.denominator: within-system sum of preregistered source-fact weights
metrics.weight: frozen source-inventory fact weight; minimum over systems

metrics.numerator: sum of preregistered mandatory-observation weights preserved by source encodings
within-system sum of preserved mandatory-observation weights
metrics.denominator: within-system sum of preregistered mandatory-observation weights
metrics.weight: frozen source-inventory observation weight; minimum over systems

metrics.numerator: source systems with certified compilation to at least two independently implemented compatible backend families
metrics.denominator: preregistered source systems having at least two independently adjudicated compatible backend families

metrics.numerator: independently adjudicated compatible cells producing a preservation certificate or profile-permitted typed-loss certificate
executed cells whose lifted native observations satisfy the frozen equivalence relation with no unexplained violation
independently adjudicated compatible cells selected and completed for native execution
metrics.weight: one per compatible cell, subject to every source/backend stratum being sampled

metrics.numerator: development-corpus headline score minus frozen-core holdout headline score
metrics.denominator: one percentage-point scale for the same frozen headline metric

metrics.numerator: facts or mandatory observations absent from output without a typed disposition
metrics.denominator: all facts and mandatory observations presented to a frontend or compiler

metrics.numerator: population members or cells excluded after any result-dependent inspection
metrics.denominator: all frozen population members and cells

metrics.numerator: critical source-inventory conflicts unresolved at publication
